results.title: Life only ever happens in the present, yet most of us spend it somewhere else — rehearsing the future, replaying the past, half-watching the moment we’re actually in
results.description: I was waiting for a friend at a café the other afternoon — one of those places in Ho Chi Minh city where the stools spill out onto the pavement and the motorbikes go past close enough to feel. He was running late, so I ordered a cà phê sữa đá and took out my [...] The post Life only ever happens in the present, yet most of us spend it somewhere else — rehearsing the future, replaying the past, half-watching the moment we’re actually in appeared first on Space Daily .
